name: Coca-Cola Original
description: Enjoy the crisp and refreshing taste of Coca-Cola Original. This classic flavor is perfect for any occasion, whether you're celebrating, relaxing, or spending time with loved ones. Make any moment better with a soda that's always delicious and always iconic.

name: Diet Coke
description: It's the one and only Diet Coke®. It's your everyday hero. Your deliciously fizzy go-to companion. It might have a brand new look, but it's the same Diet Coke® you know and love. Oh yeah, and it's incredibly refreshing. Always.

name: Lay's Classic
description: The classic recipe from Herman Lay: real potatoes, oil and salt - perfected over 80 years and still used today.

name: Baked Lay's Classic
description: Made with our signature baking process for a deliciously crispy and light crunch, our crisps are never fried and baked with olive oil, which means 50% less fat — sprinkled with sea salt for the perfect classic taste.
